ideal_avatar: aspiring women founders in the wellness space who feel stuck under a corporate ceiling
niche: holistic business coaching for wellness founders
primary_goal: launch a profitable, purpose-led practice within a year
tone_style_1: Maya Angelou in Letter to My Daughter
offer_benefit: a fully-booked, sustainable practice in 90 days
product_info: live weekly cohort calls, a client-attraction template library, and 1:1 coaching
brand_info: Rooted Practice is a movement for purpose-led founders who refuse to burn out
